events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial electrical, motor circuits & disconnects, observed field condition: disconnect not within sight. Work tested/inspected. Reference NEC Art. 430. Need compare field condition. NEC 430.102(B) requires disconnecting means within sight from motor and driven machinery location, unless meets exceptions (e.g., capable of being locked in open position, etc). "Disconnect not within sight" likely non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Disconnect not within sight creates hazard for servicing; high. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 100 since tested/inspected? Overall progress maybe 95. value irrelevant 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: disconnect not within sight of motor/equipment violates NEC 430.102(B). actions: relocate disconnect or install approved lockable disconnect within sight, coordinate with inspector. rationale. references NEC Art. 430.102(B). Need ensure JSON valid.

  "actions": ["Relocate the disconnecting means so it is within sight of the motor and driven machinery", "If relocation is not feasible, install an approved lockable disconnect within sight per NEC 430.102(B) exception and obtain inspector approval", "Re-inspect after correction before energizing or accepting the circuit"],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430 requires the motor disconnecting means to be within sight from the motor and driven machinery location unless a specific exception is met. A disconnect that is not within sight prevents safe verification of isolation and is a code violation, so the installation fails inspection.",
  "references": ["NEC Art. 430.102(B)"]
